172.16.0.1.name: OPNsense
172.16.0.1.notes: Lab network border router and NAT gateway. ntopng on port 3000. WAN gateway is 192.168.68.1 (home router). All lab traffic passes through here.

172.16.0.9.name: labSwitch
172.16.0.9.notes: Lab switch. Currently unreachable per OPNsense gateway monitor (100% loss). May be decommissioned or powered off.

172.16.0.10.name: proxBig.prox
172.16.0.10.notes: Standalone Proxmox hypervisor — not clustered. Manages its own VMs independently. Port 8006 is web UI, 3128 is SPICE proxy.

172.16.0.11.name: yin.prox
172.16.0.11.notes: Proxmox HA cluster node (paired with yang, 172.16.0.12). VMs can live-migrate between yin and yang — a new port may be a migrated VM, not a new service.

172.16.0.12.name: yang.prox
172.16.0.12.notes: Proxmox HA cluster node (paired with yin, 172.16.0.11). Same expected ports and VM migration context as yin.

172.16.0.13.name: piholelab
172.16.0.13.notes: Primary DNS for the lab network (172.16.0.0/22). Pi-hole admin UI on 80/443. Static DHCP entry confirmed in OPNsense.

172.16.0.100.name: winvm.prox
172.16.0.100.notes: Windows lab VM on proxBig. RDP and SMB are expected. Hostname 'WindowsVM' in OPNsense DHCP. Proxmox MAC prefix (bc:24:11). Sensor not yet deployed.

172.16.0.106.name: code-server.prox
172.16.0.106.notes: Code server VM. Currently OFFLINE per OPNsense DHCP. Port 8080/8443 for code-server web UI when running.

172.16.0.107.name: windowsVM2
172.16.0.107.notes: Second Windows lab VM. Currently OFFLINE per OPNsense DHCP. Static DHCP entry exists but host is not active.

172.16.0.184.name: opsbox
172.16.0.184.notes: UNREGISTERED HOST. Appears in OPNsense ARP table with Proxmox MAC prefix — almost certainly a VM. No static DHCP entry, not formally registered. Investigate: who created this VM, what is it running, is it authorized?

172.16.0.198.name: sentinelzero-dhcp
172.16.0.198.notes: SentinelZero's dynamic DHCP address on enp6s18. The stable management IP is 172.16.0.254 (dummy0). IDS alerts for SSH scanning from this IP are expected — that is nmap scanning port 22 as part of normal network scans. Suppress Suricata SID 2003068 for this source or add it to a scan whitelist.

172.16.0.180.name: sentinel-hunter
172.16.0.180.notes: Dedicated hunter VM. Dual-homed on enp6s18 (172.16.0.180) and enp6s19 (192.168.68.53). Runs autonomous seed/rank/probe loops and triggers scan handoffs.

172.16.0.254.name: sentinelzero
172.16.0.254.notes: SentinelZero monitoring host. Port 5000 is the backend API. Proxmox MAC prefix confirms it runs as a VM. Any unexpected port here = immediate escalation.

192.168.68.202.name: palindrome
192.168.68.202.notes: Dev PC on home network (Ubuntu 24.04). SSH only expected. Endpoint sensor deployed. Any port beyond SSH is unusual and should be corroborated by process timeline.

192.168.68.1.name: home-router
192.168.68.1.notes: Home network router. Upstream gateway for OPNsense WAN. Has a static route for 172.16.0.0/22 → OPNsense. Confirmed as OPNsense WAN_DHCP and LAN_GW gateway address.

192.168.68.79.name: homebridge
192.168.68.79.notes: Homebridge — HomeKit bridge for smart home devices. Port 8581 is the Homebridge web UI.

192.168.71.25.name: pihole-home
192.168.71.25.notes: DNS / Pi-hole for home network (192.168.68.0/22 range). Endpoint sensor deployed.

192.168.71.30.name: ubuntu-server
192.168.71.30.notes: Ubuntu server on home network. Also acts as backup DNS for the home segment.

192.168.71.40.name: vpn-endpoint
192.168.71.40.notes: VPN endpoint. OpenVPN on 1194, WireGuard on 51820.
